We look at the historical, mythological and literary origins of the Faustian bargain with bass-baritone Teddy Tahu Rhodes, who plays Méphistophélès in the Opera Australia production of Gounod's Faust in Melbourne and Sydney. We're also joined by scholar Peter Tregear, a Principal Fellow of the Melbourne Conservatorium of Music.
